name: Cauliflower-Broccoli "Cheese" Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the cauliflower and broccoli florets, carrots, garlic, and onions to the skillet. Sauté for 7 minutes until the vegetables are tender.
3. Stir in tamari, salt, and garlic powder. Cook for an additional 3 minutes.
4. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
5. In an 8 x 12 inch casserole dish, alternate layers of cheesy gravy and sautéed mixture, finishing with a layer of gravy on top.
6. Sprinkle nutritional yeast and paprika over the top.
7. Bake for 30 minutes or until heated through and slightly golden on top.
